title: AN ACT NAMING THAT PORTION OF THE NORTH DIVERSION   ROAD   PASSING   THROUGH  THE PROVINCE  OF BULACAN "MARCELO   H. DEL , PILAR HIGHWAY."

chunks.text:
H. No. 13237 / 65 OG No. 23, 5838 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5308, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT NAMING THAT PORTION OF THE NORTH DIVERSION ROAD PASSING THROUGH THE PROVINCE OF BULACAN "MARCELO H. DEL , PILAR HIGHWAY."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. That portion of the North Diversion Road passing through the territorial jurisdiction of the Province of Bulacan is hereby named "Marcelo H. del Pilar HighÂway."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
